labels.en: Numerical methods · chapter two

labels.zh-CN: 把 6 × 6 系统变成可复用求解器
labels.en: Turn the 6-by-6 system into a reusable solver
Goal: do not explicitly compute G inverse

labels.zh-CN: 部分主元：每一步都先检查候选行
labels.en: Partial pivoting: inspect candidate rows at every step

labels.zh-CN: 选择当前列中绝对值最大的候选主元
labels.en: Choose the largest absolute pivot candidate in the current column

labels.zh-CN: P 只置换方程行，不置换特征列
labels.en: P permutes equation rows, not feature columns
Pivot rows recorded by the notebook
Keep the current row

labels.zh-CN: 本例 5 次均保留当前行
labels.en: All five checks keep the current row in this example

labels.zh-CN: 本例未换行 ≠ 算法不检查主元
labels.en: No swap here does not mean the algorithm skips pivot checks
General invariant: PG = LU
Record row permutations
Here P equals I_6
Store elimination multipliers
Unit lower triangular
Retain elimination results
Upper triangular

labels.zh-CN: 分解完成后：两次三角求解，不计算逆
labels.en: After factorization: two triangular solves, no inverse
Step 1 · forward substitution
Solve z from top to bottom
Step 2 · back substitution
Solve beta from bottom to top
G inverse does not enter the computation

labels.zh-CN: 四个数分别检查不同环节
labels.en: Four numbers check different stages

labels.zh-CN: X 不变 → G 不变 → 同一组 P、L、U 可以复用
labels.en: Unchanged X means unchanged G and reusable P, L, U
Shared solver
One factorization
One factorization | two triangular solves

labels.zh-CN: 只替换右端项；自然对数目标不改变左侧矩阵
labels.en: Only replace the right-hand side; natural-log target leaves the left matrix unchanged

labels.zh-CN: 小残差 ≠ 对输入不敏感
labels.en: Small residual does not imply low input sensitivity

labels.zh-CN: 下一段：用条件数检查问题本身的敏感性
labels.en: Next: use conditioning to inspect the problem's sensitivity
